_comment: Stage 2 artifact for family-bootstrap. Capabilities lifted from site-build-procedure.md §8.2 + §9 + §10 plus Awwwards-tier polish + awards from research/E2.

capabilities.name: stabilization-report
capabilities.description: 30-day stabilization report at end of Phase 7 hypercare window

capabilities.name: hypercare-digest
capabilities.description: Daily hypercare memo during weeks 1-4 — error rate, perf, conversion, hot issues

capabilities.name: launch-comms
capabilities.description: Launch communications — internal Slack/all-hands + external email/blog/social + status-page entry

capabilities.name: conformance-statement
capabilities.description: WCAG 2.2 Accessibility Conformance Statement at Phase 5 close

capabilities.name: optimization-backlog
capabilities.description: Prioritized optimization backlog (RICE/ICE-scored) at T+8 weeks; ongoing through Phase 7

capabilities.name: optimization-loop
capabilities.description: Single experimentation cycle (hypothesize → design → build → run → analyze → decide → iterate)

capabilities.name: polish-discipline
capabilities.description: Polish phase plan — areas to polish, polish budget, polish gate / readiness criteria

capabilities.name: monthly-stakeholder-report
capabilities.description: Monthly stakeholder report consolidating 4 weekly memos with deeper qualitative summary

capabilities.name: quarterly-business-review
capabilities.description: Quarterly Business Review — comprehensive metrics + ROI + competitive position + strategic recommendations

capabilities.name: win-regression-report
capabilities.description: Win/regression report at T+8 — wins, regressions, surprises, stable metrics; share with sponsor + stakeholders

capabilities.name: diagnostic-sweep
capabilities.description: Phase 7 diagnostic sweep — heatmap + funnel + survey + form analytics + page-perf + a11y re-audit

capabilities.name: aeo-baseline
capabilities.description: AI Search baseline — manual prompt testing across ChatGPT / Perplexity / Google AI Overviews / Gemini / Claude

capabilities.name: annual-retrospective
capabilities.description: Annual retrospective + roadmap proposal at year mark

capabilities.name: awards-submission
capabilities.description: Awwwards / SOTD / Honors submission package — case-study writeup, screenshots, video, jury narrative

capabilities.name: content-audit
capabilities.description: Phase 7 content audit — top pages refresh, underperformers, internal linking
capabilities.primary_cite: §10.3.4 — folds into optimization-backlog-author and ongoing content-team work

capabilities.name: performance-trend
capabilities.description: Phase 7 perf-trend analysis — bundle size growth, third-party scripts, image audit
capabilities.primary_cite: §10.3.5 — folds into optimization-loop-author and a future performance-budget-author

capabilities.name: a11y-maintenance
capabilities.description: Phase 7 quarterly a11y re-audit + annual full audit
capabilities.primary_cite: §10.3.6 — folds into conformance-statement-author re-issue + a11y-annotations-author for new components
